title: NEET's 25 Lakh vs Gaokao's 1.3 Crore Students: Inside China's Leakproof Exam
description: NEET UG 2026 Paper Leak: China's Gaokao examination witnesses participation from nearly 1.3 crore students every year. Despite the massive scale, incidents of paper leaks or major exam irregularities are rarely reported in China.
